projects.name: Bible1
rules: Send daily passages you read from the bible
(Optionaly) Share one reflection or verse that stood out
Miss 10 days in a cycle and you are out

projects.name: Bible2
rules: Send daily passages you read from the bible
(Optionaly) Share one reflection or verse that stood out
Miss 10 days in a cycle and you are out

projects.name: Bible
rules: Send daily passages you read from the bible
(Optionaly) Share one reflection or verse that stood out
Miss 10 days in a cycle and you are out

projects.name: Habits
rules: Have a habit tracker app
Pick 8 habtis that you consider challengeing, make sure they are quantifiable
Pick only 2 habits that can be done more than once per day up to 3 times
Send 1 screen shot of your habit tracker once per cycle
Miss 10 days in a cycle and you are out
You can only one negative habit (Not doing something)

projects.name: Hidden in My Heart
rules: Choose one continuous passage from the Bible to memorize.
Send the starting verse of your chosen passage in the group before beginning.
Memorize the passage and recite it to another member of the project for verification.
Memorize at least 5 verses during each 10-day cycle.

projects.name: Study
projects.description: Acedemic study on a timer app
rules: Use a timer app to track study sessions.
Any focused study time is counted
Minimum 3 hours per 10-day cycle.

projects.name: Work
rules: Use a timer app to track working hours.

projects.name: Languages
rules: Complete two lessons in any course of your choice (Academic or Application).
Watch at least one video (minimum 30 minutes) in the language you are currently learning.
Report your progress in the group, including the number of lessons completed and the total video time watched.

projects.name: PM
rules: Don't get banned from your project

trainings.name: Language Course
trainings.description: Learn any language through structured lessons. Study a short lesson, complete practice exercises, and finish with a brief exam to reinforce what you’ve learned.

trainings.name: Drums
trainings.description: Learn to play the drums step by step. Practice rhythm, understand drum notation, and complete a short test after each lesson to track your progress.

trainings.name: Singing
trainings.description: Improve your vocal skills through guided exercises. Strengthen your voice, develop control, and build confidence with structured practice sessions.

trainings.name: Python
trainings.description: Learn programming fundamentals and automation through practical lessons. Start with the basics, practice key concepts, and gradually progress to more advanced skills.

trainings.name: Chess
trainings.description: Develop strategic thinking through chess training. Study core principles, practice tactical exercises, and improve your decision-making on the board.
